name: He Possesses the World's Most Brilliant Mind (Pirate Foil)
effect_text: [Main] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 [Egghead] type card other than [He Possesses the World's Most Brilliant Mind] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.[Trigger] Draw 1 card.
